summary:
The patient’s presentation suggests conditions that commonly involve moderate-to-high levels of proteinuria such as FSGS, membranous glomerulonephritides, and IgA nephropathy; thus,
\boxed{\text{minimal change disease}} presents differently by lacking prominent early-stage proteinuria.
